verses.text: Jehoshafat si a, David khuapi sungah a pate tawh kivui hi. Tua ciangin a tapa Jehoram in ama tangin uk hi
Jehoshafat' tapa Jehoram' sanggam pasalte: Azariah, Jehiel, Zekhariah, Azariah, Mikhael, leh Shefatiah ahi uh hi. Hihte khempeuh, Judah kumpi Jehoshafat' tapate ahi hi
A pa un amaute tungah letsong lianpite, ngun, kham, leh a manpha neihsate, Judah gamsunga kulhnei khuapite tawh a pia hi. Ahih hangin amah ta upa ahih manin Jehoram tungah kumpi gam a pia hi
A pa' kumpi tokhom tungah Jehoram kahin a kip ciangin namsau tawh a sanggam pasal khempeuh that a, Judah ulian pawlkhat zong a that hi
Jehoram kumpi a suahin a kum sawmthumlenih pha a, Jerusalem-ah kum giat sung uk hi
Amah in Ahab innkuan mah bangin Israel kumpi dangte' gamtat a zui hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Ahab' tanu ama zi ahi hi. Topa' muhna-ah amah a sia gamta hi
Ahi zongin, David tawh a bawlsa a thuciamna, ama tung leh a suante tungah ukna za a piak suakna ding a ciam khitna hangin Topa in David' suante susia lo hi
Ama hun sungin Judah ukna panin Edom lengkhia-in amau' kumpi tuam a koih uh hi
Tua ciangin ama nuai-a a ukte leh a leengte khempeuh tawh Jehoram galkah a, zanin amah kipanin amah leh a leeng ukte a umcih Edom mite a vatgawp hi
Tua ahih ciangin tuni dongin Judah ukna panin Edom mite lengkhia hi. Amah in a pu a pate' Pasian, Topa nusia ahih manin tua hun laitakin Libnah zong ama ukna panin a lengkhia hi
Tua thamloin amah in Judah mualtung gamah mual dawna biakpiaknate bawl a, Jerusalem-a teng mite citakloin omsak a, Judah mite lampialsak hi

Tua ciangin kamsang Elijah tung panin ama kiangah laikhak khat hong tung a, “Na pu David' Pasian, Topa in hih bangin ci hi: ‘Na pa Jehoshafat' gamtat bang leh Judah kumpi Asa' gamtat bangin gamta loin

Israel kumpi dangte' gamtat bangin gamta-in Ahab innkuan in cihtaklohna-ah Israel a paipih bangin Judah leh Jerusalem-a teng mite cihtaklohna-ah na paipih a, na pa' innkuan sung panin nang sangin a hoihzaw na sanggam pasalte zong na that hi
Tua ahih manin na mite, na tate, na zite, leh na neih khempeuh tungah Topa in gimna lianpi khat hong tungsak ding a
na natna hangin a ni ni-in na gil a tolhkhiat dongin, nangmahmah in gilnatna lianpi khat na nei ding hi,’ ci hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Topa in Ethiopia mite kiangah a om Filistia mite leh Arab mite, Jehoram tungah a hehna dingun toklo hi

Tua ahih ciangin Judah a simin amaute hong kuanto-in luh uh a, kumpipa' inn-ah a om a muh uh na khempeuh, leh a tapate leh a zite zong puakhia uh a, a tapa neupen Jehoahaz simloh a tapate a kinusia omlo hi
Hih thute khempeuh khit ciangin Topa in a dam theilo natna tawh a gil nasak hi
A hun a cin', kum nih beina ciangin a natna hangin a gil tolhkhia a, nakpi takin na sa-in a si hi. A pate-a' dingin mei a cih uh bangin a mite in amah zahtakna-in mei cihlo uh hi

Amah in uk ding a kipatin kum sawmthumlenih a pha hi. Jerusalem-ah kum giat sung uk a, kuama dahpih lohin amah kihemkhia hi. Amaute in David khuapi sungah amah vui uh a, ahih hangin kumpite' han sungah kivui lo hi.
